top_signals.title: Bond Traders Bet on a CPI Surge That Bolsters Case for Fed Pivot
top_signals.summary: Bond traders are wagering that inflation figures this week will show the strongest price pressures in several years, adding to pressure on the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
